examples: The foraminifera in the core samples were most abundant after 1950, when farmers began using some fertilizer, which is rich in nutrients.
The fossils buried in Pleistocene and earlier ocean sediments were of foraminifera鈥攕mall, single-celled marine organisms that secrete shells of calcium carbonate, or calcite.
But these shells are absent from the foraminifera found in Challenger Deep.
